parameters.win_upload_file: K:\J Submission\Submittal and RFI Tracker Lists.xlsx

dynamic_column_creation.description: Executed by _initialize_missing_columns. If a schema column is not found in the input data, it is created using the global or column-specific default value.

calculation.description: Auto-generated row index starting from 1 for each imported data row

validation.description: Row index must be a positive integer starting from 1

formatting.description: Applied via _apply_forward_fill formatting. Ensures session identifiers are uniformly padded specifically to 6 digits.

null_handling.description: Processed by _apply_forward_fill. Leverages sequential filling combined with zfill formatting to create standardized submission containers.

validation.description: Ensures submission_date is the same for the same submission_session and submission_session_revision

null_handling.description: Processed by _apply_forward_fill. Performs grouping by Submission_Session and applies 2-digit zero-padding to create unique revision identifiers.

Forward fill within same submission session

null_handling.description: Two-level forward fill per submission sessions if column exists per original dcc_mdl.ipynb logic, with 'NA' used as the final fallback after all forward-fill passes.
Processed by _apply_default_value. Fills nulls with 'NA' to ensure Document_ID calculation remains valid.

validation.description: Validated by _apply_validation using regex pattern matching. Warns if identifier contains non-alphanumeric characters.

null_handling.description: Processed by _apply_default_value. Fills nulls with 'NA' to ensure Document_ID calculation remains valid.

validation.description: Validated by _apply_validation against document_type_schema.document[*].code to ensure Document_Type exists in the approved document type code list.

null_handling.description: Processed by _apply_default_value. Fills nulls with 'NA' to ensure Document_ID calculation remains valid.

validation.description: Validated by _apply_validation against discipline_schema.discipline[*].code to ensure Discipline exists in the approved discipline code list.

formatting.description: Apply zero-padding to numeric values (e.g., 1 → 0001). Text values remain unchanged.

null_handling.description: Processed by _apply_default_value. Fills nulls with '0000' to ensure Document_ID calculation remains valid. Numeric values are zero-padded to 4 digits.

validation.description: Validated by _apply_validation using regex pattern matching. Ensures only numeric characters are used.

calculation.description: Calculated via _apply_composite_calculation with method build_document_id. Concatenates identifiers using the defined format string.

null_handling.description: Leave null values as-is; will be populated by is_calculated logic (composite/build_document_id).

validation.description: Validated by _apply_validation using regex pattern matching. Ensures the final ID contains only uppercase, numeric, and hyphen characters.

Forward fill within same document and session

Processed by _apply_default_value. Fills nulls with 'NA'.

validation.description: Document title must be at least 2 characters

null_handling.description: Processed by _apply_default_value. Performs string conversion, executes explicit text replacements (nan/N.A.), and fills gaps with 'NA' to ensure data type uniformity.

calculation.description: Executed via _apply_aggregate_calculation using method 'concatenate_unique_quoted'. Groups subjects by Document_ID and applies quoting to each fragment for cross-reference readability.

validation.description: Consolidated submission subjects for each document

Forward fill within same submission session

null_handling.description: Processed via _apply_multi_level_forward_fill. Performs sequential grouping by [Session > Revision] combined with NA final filling.

Forward fill within same submission session

datetime_conversion.description: Executed via _apply_multi_level_forward_fill. Performs explicit datetime coercion for all input formats to enable chronological sorting and aggregation.

calculation.description: Calculated via _apply_aggregate_calculation with method 'min'. Identifies the earliest datetime recorded in the submission history for the unique document.
Calculated via _apply_aggregate_calculation with method 'max'. Identifies the most recent datetime recorded in the submission history for the unique document.

filter.description: Exclude NA values from latest revision calculation

mapping.description: Uses broadcast mapping to apply the calculated latest revision value to every row associated with the current Document_ID.

calculation.description: Calculated via _apply_latest_by_date_calculation. Sorts submissions by date (descending), filters out 'NA', and identifies the current state for each unique document.
Executed via _apply_aggregate_calculation using method 'concatenate_unique'. Creates a non-redundant historical list of every submission session ID associated with the document.
Executed via _apply_aggregate_calculation using method 'concatenate_dates'. Performs date format enforcement and chronological joining of all submission date occurrences.
Executed via _apply_aggregate_calculation using method 'concatenate_unique'. Joins every distinct revision number identified in the document history.
Calculated via _apply_aggregate_calculation with method 'count'. Performs a grouping count of Document_ID instances and broadcasts the result to all associated rows using 'transform'.

null_handling.description: Processed by _apply_forward_fill. Performs grouping by Session ID to ensure the assigned reviewer is consistently mapped across all documents within the same submission container.

datetime_conversion.description: Convert to datetime with errors='coerce' per original dcc_mdl.ipynb logic

Submission_Session_Revision.description: Convert Submission_Session_Revision to string for consistent grouping per original dcc_mdl.ipynb logic

null_handling.description: Processed by _apply_multi_level_forward_fill. Leverages datetime coercion, revision-level grouping, and explicit string conversion of session revisions to ensure precise historical tracking of response dates.

validation.description: Calculated planned date when S.O. is expected to respond to review

working_days.description: If enabled, performs day arithmetic using pd.offsets.BDay() to exclude weekends and holidays.

fill_value_reference.description: Resolved from approval_code_schema approval entry with code 'PEN'. Ensures single source of truth for pending status.

null_handling.description: Processed by _apply_forward_fill. Leverages cross-row grouping within the same session ID and assigns pending status (resolved from approval_code_schema PEN code) as the default state for unreviewed rows.

validation.description: Validated by _apply_validation against approval_code_schema.approval[*].status to ensure review status is valid.

calculation.description: Calculated via _apply_mapping_calculation using method 'status_to_code'. Transforms textual status labels into standardized shorthand codes defined in the mapping reference.

Forward fill within same submission session

conditional_processing.description: Only process if Review_Comments column exists in data per original dcc_mdl.ipynb logic

null_handling.description: Processed by _apply_multi_level_forward_fill. Sequentially groups by [Session > Revision] with an 'if_column_exists' pre-check to maintain comments across associated rows.

text_cleaning.description: Remove backslashes and strip whitespace per original dcc_mdl.ipynb logic

exclude_values_reference.description: Resolved from approval_code_schema approval entry with code 'PEN'. Excludes all pending status aliases from latest approval calculation.

filter.description: Exclude pending status aliases from latest approval calculation. Resolved from approval_code_schema PEN code.

fallback_value_reference.description: Resolved from approval_code_schema approval entry with code 'PEN'. Falls back to pending status if all reviews are pending.

mapping.description: Map latest non-pending status to all rows per Document_ID per original dcc_mdl.ipynb logic

calculation.description: Calculated via _apply_latest_by_date_calculation with method 'latest_non_pending_status'. Performs textual cleaning (regex strip), excludes 'Pending' states, and identifies the most recent conclusive approval for each document.

validation.description: Validated by _apply_validation against approval_code_schema.approval[*].status (excluding pending) to ensure latest approval status is valid.

text_cleaning.description: Remove forward slashes and strip whitespace per original dcc_mdl.ipynb logic

calculation.description: Calculated via _apply_mapping_calculation. Enhances data quality through forward-slash removal and whitespace stripping before mapping the latest status to a standard code.

validation.description: Validated by _apply_validation against approval_code_schema.approval[*].code to ensure latest approval code is valid.

calculation.description: Concatenates all unique approval codes for each document

validation.description: Historical approval codes for all revisions

datetime_conversion.description: Convert date columns to datetime objects per original dcc_mdl.ipynb logic

end_date_logic.description: Use actual return date if available, otherwise use today's date

then.description: Use NumPy business day count when duration_is_working_day = true

else.description: Use calendar days when duration_is_working_day = false

null_handling.description: Create mask for valid dates to prevent TypeError

final_assignment.description: Assign NaN where Submission_Date was missing

calculation.description: Calculated via conditional_business_day_calculation. Differentiates between calendar days and NumPy-powered business day counts based on project-level parameters. Includes non-negative enforcement.

text_cleaning.description: Convert to uppercase and fill nulls with NO per original dcc_mdl.ipynb logic

conditions.description: Set to YES if current submission is not the latest for this document (superseded by newer submission)
Set to YES if Latest_Approval_Code is in approval list
Default to NO for all other cases

calculation.description: Calculated via status_based conditional mapping. Merges current closure status with Latest_Approval_Code to determine if the document lifecycle has reached a terminal state (APP/VOID/INF).

conditions.description: Set to NO if submission is closed
Set to NO if a newer submission exists for this document (resubmission already done)

conditions.if: Submission_Date == Latest_Submission_Date and Review_Return_Actual_Date is null
conditions.description: Status is Pending (PEN) while awaiting the return of review comments.
Default to YES for all other cases

calculation.description: Executed via update_resubmission_required conditional check. Inherits existing flags unless the Submission_Closed state overrides the requirement to 'NO'.

(14 Working Days)

conditions.description: If submission is closed, return NaT
If review return date exists, add resubmission duration
If first submission, add first review + resubmission duration
If subsequent submission, add second review + resubmission duration

date_offset_mode.description: Two modes: working days vs calendar days per original dcc_mdl.ipynb logic

calculation.description: Calculated via custom_conditional_date logic. Applies multi-staged duration offsets (First Review + Resubmission vs Second Review + Resubmission) based on document status and terminal state checks.

conditional_processing.description: Only process if Resubmission_Forecast_Date column exists in data

Submission_Session_Revision.description: Convert Submission_Session_Revision to string for consistent grouping

null_handling.description: Processed by _apply_multi_level_forward_fill. Employs a multi-stage fallback strategy (Session+Revision -> Session-only) to preserve forecasted targets during iterative reviews.

working_days.description: Use working days if duration_is_working_day is true

conditions.if: Resubmission_Required == 'YES' and Resubmission_Plan_Date is not null and Resubmission_Plan_Date < current_date
conditions.description: If resubmission is required, has plan date, and plan date is in past, then overdue
Default to null for all other cases

date_reference.description: Use current datetime for overdue comparison per original dcc_mdl.ipynb logic

calculation.description: Calculated via calculate_overdue_status. Performs a time-relative comparison between the plan date and current_date, while accounting for actual submittal arrivals.

lookup_logic.description: If submission is closed, delay is 0

lookup_previous_submissions.description: Find previous submissions for same Document_ID with earlier dates

get_latest_plan_date.description: Get latest previous resubmission plan date

calculate_delay.description: Calculate days difference and ensure non-negative

else.description: If no previous submissions, delay is 0

calculation.description: Calculated via complex_lookup logic. Identifies delay by finding the maximum previous plan date for the same Document_ID and calculating the calendar variance against the current submission.

validation.description: Number of days delayed for resubmission
Number of days delayed for resubmission

Processed by _apply_forward_fill. Synchronizes internal reference numbers across all rows of the same Document_ID to ensure consistent tracking.

calculation.description: Calculated via direct copy mapping. Isolates the approval code for the current row to differentiate from historical aggregate statuses.
